2606.13663.title: HyperTool: Beyond Step-Wise Tool Calls for Tool-Augmented Agents
2606.13663.paper_summary: Tool-augmented LLM agents commonly rely on step-wise atomic tool calls, where each invocation, observation, and value transfer is exposed in the main reasoning trace. This creates an \emph{execution-granularity mismatch}: locally deterministic tool workflows are unfolded into repeated model-visible decisions, consuming context and forcing the model to manage low-level dataflow in the trace. We introduce \textbf{HyperTool}, a unified executable MCP-style tool interface that changes the model-visible unit of tool execution. A model invokes HyperTool with a code block that can call existing tools through their original schemas, manipulate returned values, and pass intermediate results locally, folding deterministic tool subroutines into a single outer call. To train models to use this interface, we synthesize HyperTool-format trajectories from cross-tool compositional tasks and verify them in real MCP environments. On MCP-Universe, HyperTool improves average accuracy from 15.69\% to 35.29\% on Qwen3-32B and from 9.93\% to 33.33\% on Qwen3-8B, and surpass GPT-OSS and Kimi-k2.5 on average accuracy, showing that our HyperTool can substantially improve multi-step tool use.
2606.13663.paper_summary_zh: 工具增強的 LLM 代理通常依賴於逐步的原子工具調用，其中每次調用、觀察和數值傳輸都在主要推理痕跡中顯示出來。這造成了一種 \emph{執行粒度不匹配}：局部確定性的工具工作流程被展開為重複的模型可見決策，消耗上下文並迫使模型在痕跡中管理低級數據流。我們引入了 \textbf{HyperTool}，這是一個統一的可執行 MCP 風格工具介面，改變了工具執行的模型可見單位。模型通過一個代碼塊調用 HyperTool，該代碼塊可以通過其原始模式調用現有工具，操縱返回的值，並在本地傳遞中間結果，將確定性的工具子程序折疊為單個外部調用。為了訓練模型使用這個介面，我們從跨工具組合任務合成 HyperTool 格式的軌跡，並在真實的 MCP 環境中驗證它們。在 MCP-Universe 上，HyperTool 將 Qwen3-32B 的平均準確率從 15.69\% 提高到 35.29\%，將 Qwen3-8B 的平均準確率從 9.93\% 提高到 33.33\%，並在平均準確率上超越 GPT-OSS 和 Kimi-k2.5，顯示出我們的 HyperTool 可以顯著改善多步工具的使用。
2606.13663.author: Yaxin Du et.al.
2606.13663.authors: Yaxin Du, Yifan Zhou, Yujie Ge, Jiajun Wang, Xianghe Pang, Shuo Tang, Tuney Zheng, Bryan Dai, Jian Yang, Siheng Chen
